title: Auto-pull any attachments into Files view
excerpt: It would help to have any attachment that either comes in or is sent via the Emails & Activities view in the Sales CRM be auto-added to Files. Right now, the Files tab doesn’t communicate well with the rest of the baords…

posts.author: BriKHami (Brik )
posts.cookedHtml: It would help to have any attachment that either comes in or is sent via the Emails & Activities view in the Sales CRM be auto-added to Files. Right now, the Files tab doesn’t communicate well with the rest of the baords/cards in Work Management or CRM.
